name: Lakhnawi Khatti Dal (Lucknow Sour Lentils)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lentils thoroughly.
2. Place them in a saucepan with turmeric and 5 cups of boiling water.
3. Bring to a boil, stirring often.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, partially covered, for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in lemon juice and cook for an additional 15 minutes.
6. Turn off the heat and whisk the mixture.
7. Heat ghee until very hot; add cumin seeds and fry for about 10 seconds.
8. Remove from heat and add red pepper and minced garlic.
9. Stir rapidly for 10 seconds until the garlic begins to color, but do not let it brown.
10. Pour over the hot lentil puree and serve immediately.
